# PySCF (optional)

This repo supports interoperability with **PySCF**.

Recommended: install PySCF via pip/conda for your platform.

If you want it vendored as a git submodule for development:

```bash
git submodule add https://github.com/pyscf/pyscf.git third_party/pyscf
```

The catsim adapter lives at `src/catsim_core/pyscf/`.
